inputs.label: Reference Note MIDI Number
inputs.businessContext: MIDI note number of the reference pitch (e.g., A4 = 69).

businessContext_i18n.en: MIDI note number of the reference pitch (e.g., A4 = 69).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Referans perdenin MIDI nota numarası (ör. A4 = 69).

inputs.label: Reference Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Standard tuning frequency of the reference note in Hertz.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard tuning frequency of the reference note in Hertz.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Referans notanın standart akort frekansı (Hertz cinsinden).

inputs.label: Target Note MIDI Number
inputs.businessContext: MIDI note number of the key to tune.

businessContext_i18n.en: MIDI note number of the key to tune.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akort edilecek tuşun MIDI nota numarası.

inputs.label: Detuning Offset
inputs.businessContext: Tuning offset in cents (1/100 semitone) for historical temperaments or artistic adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tuning offset in cents (1/100 semitone) for historical temperaments or artistic adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tarihsel mizaçlar veya sanatsal ayarlama için sent (1/100 yarım ton) cinsinden akort sapması.

inputs.label: Inharmonicity Coefficient (B)
inputs.businessContext: Inharmonicity coefficient for stretch tuning. Typical for a piano: B ≈ 0.0004. Set to 0 for pure equal temperament.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inharmonicity coefficient for stretch tuning. Typical for a piano: B ≈ 0.0004. Set to 0 for pure equal temperament.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Germe akort için armonik olmayanlık katsayısı. Piyano için tipik: B ≈ 0.0004. Saf eşit mizaç için 0'a ayarlayın.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
